description.value:
Soot-scribed breaking-words — Askmål fire-readers know words that describe the precise weakness in any structure; inscribed into a blade in soot that never wipes off, the words make the weapon understand what it is breaking against and where to push.

Effect: You gain an edge on Might tests made to break mundane objects and barriers with a strike using this weapon. If the object has a breakage threshold, the Director may treat it as one step lower (Director adjudicates).

Rules: Edge; Tests; Strike.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of exceptional quality; a soot-ink breaking-word inscription provided by an Askmål fire-reader
